title: stelis peliochyla
intro: Stelis peliochyla, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions. Traditionally, Stelis peliochyla has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in Brazil, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems, due to its saponins and flavonoids content. In herbal preparations, Stelis peliochyla is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat various ailments.
